snippet.title: The Battles : Kasun /Lakindu/Pasindu V Janitha Nipun | Hey Ganaraya | The Voice Sri Lanka
snippet.description:
The Voice Sri Lanka

The Voice One of the most successful reality TV formats in the world. Extremely successful in 180 countries. 
SRI LANKA’S NEWEST TELEVISION EXPERIENCE - The Voice Sri Lanka

The Voice is an international reality television singing competition franchise of Dutch origin. It is based on the reality singing competition The Voice of Holland, which was originally created by Dutch television producer John de Mol. The show's format features five stages of competition: producers' auditions, blind auditions, battle rounds, knockouts (since 2012), and live performance shows.

A combined 438 singers have won The Voice, The Voice Kids, The Voice Teens and The Voice Senior in 145 countries/regions. Each winner is given a recording contract, a monetary prize, and a title as that nation's "Voice". 

Official Facebook Page - https://www.facebook.com/TheVoiceSriLankaOfficial
Official Instagram - https://www.instagram.com/thevoicesrilanka
Subscribe Sirasa TV on Youtube : https://bit.ly/3sCpWEz

#TheVoiceSL #SirasaTV #TheVoiceSriLanka #TheVoiceSL #TheVoiceLK #VoiceSriLanka #VoiceLK #lka

snippet.title: The Battles : Jithendra V Lakshitha | Siri Sangabodhi |  Ahankara Nagare | The Voice Sri Lanka
snippet.description:
The Battles : A R Jithendra V Lakshitha Mihiran | Mashup | Siri Sangabodhi Maligawedi | Ahankara Nagare  | The Voice Sri Lanka

The Voice Sri Lanka

The Voice One of the most successful reality TV formats in the world. Extremely successful in 180 countries. 
SRI LANKA’S NEWEST TELEVISION EXPERIENCE - The Voice Sri Lanka

The Voice is an international reality television singing competition franchise of Dutch origin. It is based on the reality singing competition The Voice of Holland, which was originally created by Dutch television producer John de Mol. The show's format features five stages of competition: producers' auditions, blind auditions, battle rounds, knockouts (since 2012), and live performance shows.

A combined 438 singers have won The Voice, The Voice Kids, The Voice Teens and The Voice Senior in 145 countries/regions. Each winner is given a recording contract, a monetary prize, and a title as that nation's "Voice".

snippet.title: India overwhelmed by world’s worst Covid crisis - BBC News
snippet.description:
International help is being pledged for India as it battles a ferocious second wave of coronavirus, described by Prime Minister Narendra Modi as a storm that has shaken the nation.

Almost 350,000 new infections were recorded in India in the latest 24 hour period - a record number for the fourth day in a row. 

As the epidemic continues to grow hospitals are under intolerable pressure - with shortages of beds and critical supplies including oxygen. 

Mishal Husain presents BBC News at Ten reporting by Yogita Limaye in Delhi and diplomatic correspondent Paul Adams. 

Please subscribe HERE http://bit.ly/1rbfUog

#BBCNews

snippet.title: ‘A coronavirus tsunami we had never seen before’ - BBC News
snippet.description:
India's Covid caseload has risen sharply in the past few weeks.

The country's been reporting more than 150,000 cases a day. In January and February daily cases fell below 20,000.

So, how did India get from relative calm to its new crisis?

Workplaces, markets and malls have reopened, and transport is operating at full capacity. Big weddings, festivals and election rallies are also being held.

The result: a situation that one doctor described as a "Covid tsunami".

The BBC's Vikas Pandey and Anshul Verma report.

Additional inputs by BBC Marathi, graphics by Nikita Deshpande.

Additional footage from Reuters and Getty.

Please subscribe HERE http://bit.ly/1rbfUog

#BBCNews

මං කියන දේ ආදරෙන් අහන්නකෝ
වංචා හිතේ වැරදි අත් හරින්නකෝ
දැන් මා ඔබේ ලඟ නොවේ හිතන්නකෝ

ප්‍රශ්නයක් අහන්නද - ලස්සනයිද ජීවිතේ
උත්තරෙත් කියන්නද - වැරදුනානෙ ජීවිතේ..//

ඔබ කලේ සෙල්ලමක් - මං පරාද චරිතයක්
ජීවිතේ හිරගෙයක් - දුකම වින්ඳා කාලයක්
නෑ පොහොසත් කම දුප්පත් - පිලිගන්නවා මගේ
තව දුරටත් හිත සවිමත් - වට්ටන්න බෑ හොඳේ

ප්‍රශ්නයක් අහන්නද - ලස්සනයිද ජීවිතේ
උත්තරෙත් කියන්නද - වැරදුනානෙ ජීවිතේ..//

සිහිවුනා පොඩි දෙයක් - ඔබ කියාපු වචනයක්
ආදරෙයි මහ ගොඩක් - කිවුව නැද්ද මතකයක්
නෑ පොහොසත් කම දුප්පත් - පිලිගන්නවා මගේ

ප්‍රශ්නයක් අහන්නද - ලස්සනයිද ජීවිතේ

snippet.title: Watch: Doctor Breaks Down, Says "Never Seen Anything Like This"
snippet.description:
Coronavirus News in Mumbai: "We are helpless... never seen such a situation before... people are panicking..." - the desperate words of an overworked and traumatised Mumbai doctor driven to tears as an avalanche of Covid-positive patients threatens to overrun the medical infrastructure in one of the world's biggest cities. An appeal by Dr Trupti Gilada, an infectious diseases specialist, was widely shared on Tuesday - as the scale of the crisis - the lack of hospital beds, ever-increasing daily new cases, shortage of vaccines and crucial drugs like Remdesivir, and the oxygen crisis - becomes clear.

snippet.title: India Covid crisis: Scramble for oxygen amid surge in coronavirus cases | ITV News
snippet.description:
The enormous scale of India's struggle with the world's worst coronavirus outbreak was laid bare on Saturday, as it recorded almost one million new cases in just three days. 

Hospitals are being overwhelmed by a monumental surge of seriously ill patients. 

Beds and vital equipment are in critically short supply and oxygen - the only hope for those in the advanced stages of the disease - is fast running out. 

Read more: https://bit.ly/3esPKg2

snippet.title: සඳ කියන්නේ පිස්සුවක් | Piyath Rajapakse & Sandani Fernando | Music Pickle
snippet.description:
Music Pickle එකට ආදරේ කරන ඔයාල බලාගෙන ඇති මේ සතියේ කවුද අපි program එකට එකතු කරගත්තේ කියලා. මේ සතියේ අපි එකතු කරගත්තේ ගොඩාක් ආදරෙන් ඉන්න තරු දෙකක්. ඒ තමයි Sirasa Super Star තරගය ජයග්‍රහණය කරමින් ක්ෂේත්‍රයට පැමිණි පියත් රාජපක්ෂ සහ මේ දිනවල ටෙලිනාට්‍ය කීපයකින්ම ඔබ හමුවට එන දක්ෂ රංගන ශිල්පිණියක් වන සදනි ෆනෑන්ඩු.
මේ දෙදෙනා පෞද්ගලික ජීවිතේදීත් හරිම Loving Couple එකක් නිසා දෙන්නා එක්ක ලස්සන වගේම ආදරණීය program එකක් කරන්න Music Pickle අපිට පුලුවන් වුණා. ඉතින් එකතු වෙන්න වෙනදා වගේම Music Pickle සමගින්.

snippet.title: Covid: India faces 'disaster' as cases surge and hospitals suffer oxygen shortage | ITV News
snippet.description:
Health officials in India are urging people not to panic as the government insisted it's doing all it can to get oxygen to desperate Covid patients.

Supplies are being diverted from industrial use, as hospitals run out.

Once again the country recorded the highest ever number of new infections for a fifth day in a row.

One doctor warned India will become a "disaster zone" if cases continue to rise.

And a warning - this report from our Correspondent John Ray contains some upsetting images.

Song Lyrics: 

මතකද මාව
තාම ඔයාට
දවසක් හරි ආදරෙ කල
මුල්ම කෙනාව

මගේ ජීවිතය 
බාරයි ඔබට
සංසාරෙම පතාන ආ
කෙනා ඔයාව

ඔයාවමයි ඕනේ
දන්නවාද රත්තරනේ
ජීවිතයම වාගේ
මගේ තාම ඔයානේ

පරිස්සම් කලා තුරුලෙම
තියා ඔයාව 
පුදුමයි මගේ ප්‍රේමය 
නොරිස්සුම් උනේ
කොහොමද මගේ ආලය
අමතක නොවෙයි ඔයාව

තිගැස්සුම් උනා හදවත
යද්දි ඔයාව
මතකයි තාම කතාව
හිනැස්සූ ඔබම මේ ඇස්
හැඩවු පමාව

snippet.title: B&B එක්ක අවුරුදු - Episode 3 | Kokila Pawan & Nimali Fernando
snippet.description:
මේ දවස්වල ටෙලිවිෂන් බලන හැමෝම වගේ හුඟක් ආදරේ කරන චරිතයක් තමයි මාලන්. මාලන් කියනවටත් වඩා "මනමාලං" කියල තමයි එයාව හුඟ දෙනෙක් අඳුනන්නෙ. ඉතිං මේ සැරේ අපේ අවුරුදු කෑම Challenge එකට එකතු වුනේ පුංචි තිරයේ මනමාලන් වූ 'කෝකිල පවන්' සහ ඔහුගේ බිරිඳ 'නිමාලි ප්‍රනාන්දු' දෙන්නා. මේ දෙන්නට අපි දුන්න Challenge එක තමයි අග්ගලා හදන්න. කොහොමින් හරි අග්ගලා හැදිල්ලට අමතරව විවාහ ජීවිතයට වැදගත් පාඩමකුත් ඉගෙන ගන්න කෝකිලට පුළුවන් වුනා.


Subscribe to : https://goo.gl/Ym9F5f 
Like us on Facebook : https://www.facebook.com/boldandbeautifullk/
Follow us on Instagram : https://www.instagram.com/boldandbeautiful_lk/

#comedianvivek #Vivek #Actorvivek

Tamil actor Vivek passed away in a Chennai hospital early on Saturday following a cardiac arrest. He was 59. Vivek was admitted to the intensive care unit of the hospital on Friday morning after he suffered a heart attack. A medical bulletin said he underwent “emergency coronary angiogram followed by angioplasty” on Friday.

snippet.title: Poronduwak (පණට නමක් 2 ) | Manej Sanjaya New Song  | පොරොන්දුවක් මේක මගේ | Official Music Video 2021
snippet.description:
පොරොන්දුවක් මේක මගේ වෙනස් නොවන කිසිදාක..දුරස් වුනත් ඔබට හිතේ තියේවි ඉඩ හැමදාක..

Latest romantic music video "#Poronduwak" sung by singer -  #ManejSanjaya .
The Video is Directed By Thiwanka Mihiran, Lyrics by ' Prasanna Kumara Dammalage ' & Music by ' Hashan Thilina '.

Dial Now...
For Download " #Poronduwak " song as your RingIn Tone..
☎Dialog -  875284383
☎Mobitel - 74741125
☎Hutch - 369415900
☎Airtel - 8880090476

▶Song Name : Poronduwak
▶Artist : #ManejSanjaya
▶Lyrics : Prasanna Kumara Dammalage
▶Music : Hashan Thilina
▶Video Director : Thiwanka Mihiran
▶Production: #EvokeMusic

මා ඉන්නම් ඈතකින් නොගැටී ඔය ඇස් දෙකේ 
හැමදාමත් ආදරේ සඟවා හිතේ 
හිමිවීමක් නෑ ඉතින් ලං වූවට ඒ වගේ 
කවදාවත් ඉටු නොවේ පැතුමන් අපේ
අහඹුවක් නොවේ වුනත් මුණගැහීම මේ 
අරන් යන්න බෑ දුරක් ඇසුර තව අපේ 

පොරොන්දුවක් මේක මගේ වෙනස් නොවන කිසිදාක 
දුරස් වුනත් ඔබට හිතේ තියේවි ඉඩ හැමදාක

මුළු රෑ පුරා නින්දෙන් මා මුදා
ඒ මතකයන් හැමදා සිහිවෙලා 
හිත පෑරුවත් කොතරම් විඳ දරා 
ඉන්නම් ඉතින් නෑවිත් යලි සදා

හුරුකම් නිසා සසරේ පෙර එදා 
බැදුනත් ඉතින් නොදැනී නොසිතලා 
හැර යන්නේ නෑ කීවත් දිවුරලා 
අපි මේ භවේ අපගෙන් ගිලිහිලා

snippet.title: ඉස්කෝලෙට අවුරුදු | Music Pickle Awrudu Special
snippet.description:
මේ සතියේ Music Pickle වැඩසටහන ගොඩාක් වෙනස්. අලුත් අවුරුද්දත් අරගෙනම අපි ආවේ ඔයාලා ගොඩාක් ආදරේ කරන පිරිසක් එක්ක. මේ දවස් වල TV දෙරණ ඔස්සේ විකාශනය වන " ඉස්කෝලේ " ටෙලිනාට්‍යයට රංගනයෙන් දායක වන දමිත්‍රි ,ධනුශ්ක, හිරුෂි, නිසල්,තිනුලි, දිනුජ්, විනුක් සහ එහි තේමා ගීතය ගායනා කරන නුවන්දිකා සේනාරත්න යන අය තමා Music Pickle එක්ක අවුරුදු සමරන්න එකතු වුණේ. ඔවුන් program එක ලස්සන කරන්න ලස්සනට සින්දු කිව්වා,ලස්සන නැටුම් ඉදිරිපත් කළා. ඒ විතරක් නෙවෙයි අලුත් අවුරුදු ක්‍රීඩා කිහිපයකටම සහභාගී වුණේ ගොඩාක් උනන්දුවෙන්. ඉතින් Music pickle සමගින් එකතුවෙන්න ආරාධනා කරමින් music pickle අපි ප්‍රාර්ථනා කරනවා ඔබට ලැබුවා වූ නව වසර නිරෝගිමත් සුභම සුභ අලුත් අවුරුද්දක් වේවා කියලා.


Production Manager : Samith Roshan
Producer : Dilini Madusanka Perera
Assistant Producer : Charitha Gangewaththa
Director of Photography : Dammika Dissanayake
Camera Operators : Amayuru Withanage | Shiran Wimukthi | Akila Heshan
Editor : Dasun Prabhashwara
Post Production Supervision : Vishwa Abhishek 
Special Thanks : Nisanka Weheraduwa

snippet.title: The Battles : Miyuru Somarathne V Thilina Sudesh | Bol Pini Wahena Welawe | The Voice Sri Lanka
snippet.description:
The Voice Sri Lanka

The Voice One of the most successful reality TV formats in the world. Extremely successful in 180 countries. 
SRI LANKA’S NEWEST TELEVISION EXPERIENCE - The Voice Sri Lanka

The Voice is an international reality television singing competition franchise of Dutch origin. It is based on the reality singing competition The Voice of Holland, which was originally created by Dutch television producer John de Mol. The show's format features five stages of competition: producers' auditions, blind auditions, battle rounds, knockouts (since 2012), and live performance shows.

A combined 438 singers have won The Voice, The Voice Kids, The Voice Teens and The Voice Senior in 145 countries/regions. Each winner is given a recording contract, a monetary prize, and a title as that nation's "Voice". 

Official Facebook Page - https://www.facebook.com/TheVoiceSriLankaOfficial
Official Instagram - https://www.instagram.com/thevoicesrilanka
Subscribe Sirasa TV on Youtube : https://bit.ly/3sCpWEz

snippet.title: Queen Arrives at Windsor Castle and Funeral Procession Begins
snippet.description:
Queen Elizabeth II and other members of the Royal Family, including Prince Charles, Prince Edward, Prince Andrew and Princess Anne, joined a procession on Saturday at Windsor Castle ahead of the funeral for Prince Philip.

The service will salute both his service in the Royal Navy and his support for Britain's monarch over three quarters of a century.

#Queen #PrincePhilip #Funeral

snippet.title: Covid spreading faster in India than anywhere else - BBC News
snippet.description:
India reported a record daily increase of over 150,000 coronavirus cases - and more than 800 new deaths - on Sunday.
Since the pandemic began, the country has confirmed more than 12 million cases and over 167,000 deaths.
It has the third-highest number of Covid-19 infections in the world after the United States and Brazil.

snippet.title: Prince Philip's funeral: the key moments
snippet.description:
The funeral of the Duke of Edinburgh has taken place at St George's Chapel in Windsor.

The Queen led her family in mourning her husband of 73 years.

The service was led by the Dean of Windsor, who paid tribute to Prince Philip's "kindness, humour and humanity" - as well as his "unwavering loyalty" to Her Majesty.

Sky's Jason Farrell looks at how the funeral unfolded.

snippet.title: Asku Maaro Video | Kavin, Teju Ashwini | Dharan Kumar | K. Sivaangi | Dongli Jumbo | Sandy
snippet.description:
Stream now - https://SMI.lnk.to/AskuMaaro

The rollicking music video of #AskuMAaro composed by #DharanKumar starring #Kavin , #TejuAshwini& #Sivaangi is here! This unapologetically fun and groovy song has lyrics by #KuKarthik and is all ready to make its way to your favourite Tamil Playlist and you simply cannot miss this one! 

Song - Asku Maaro
Composed by Dharan Kumar
Featuring - Kavin, Teju Ashwini
Sung by Dharan Kumar & K. Sivaangi
Lyrics - Ku. Karthik
Directed by Dongli Jumbo
DOP - Madhesh Manickam

Producer: I & M Studios

Narasimha(Balakrishna) along with his just-born son moves to Kumbakonam and starts working as a driver. There, he comes across a corrupt cop and keeps fighting with him time and again. snippet.title: 'Mrs World' grabs crown from head of ‘Mrs Sri Lanka’ in on-stage fracas
snippet.description:
Police have arrested the reigning “Mrs World” on charges of assault over an on-stage fracas in which she pulled the crown off the head of the new “Mrs Sri Lanka”. 

Subscribe to Guardian News on YouTube ► http://bit.ly/guardianwiressub

Caroline Jurie yanked the crown off Pushpika de Silva minutes after she was declared “Mrs Sri Lanka 2020” during a gala in Colombo on April 4. Jurie declared that Pushpika de Silva was ineligible as the winner because she was divorced, and forcibly removed her crown. De Silva needed hospital treatment after the incident, seen by stunned spectators in a packed venue as well as a live social media audience. 

To qualify for the title, contestants must be married. De Silva is estranged from her husband, but they are still legally married. The local franchise holder for the pageant, Chandimal Jayasinghe, said they were “deeply disturbed and sincerely regret” the behaviour of Jurie and the told the media the crown would be returned to De Silva 

‘Mrs World’ arrested for grabbing crown from head of ‘Mrs Sri Lanka’ ► https://www.theguardian.com/world/2021/apr/08/mrs-world-arrested-for-grabbing-crown-from-head-of-mrs-sri-lanka

The Guardian publishes independent journalism, made possible by supporters. Contribute to The Guardian today ► https://bit.ly/3uhA7zg

snippet.title: Kutty Pattas Music Video | Ashwin | Reba John | Venki | Santhosh Dhayanidhi | Sandy
snippet.description:
A brilliantly vivid splash of colours and a wildly fun #KuttyPattas composed by the Raati fame #SanthoshDhayanidhi featuring the most exciting cast one could ask for! Is there a better way to head into the weekend? #Ashwin, the current darling of Tamil Television features alongside the stunningly beautiful #RebaJohn in this groovy music video directed by #Venky and choreographed by #Sandy. Watch it here and bring out the moves !
